title: centaurea pseudoscabiosa subsp. araratica
intro: Centaurea pseudoscabiosa subsp. araratica, commonly known as Mountain Scabious, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, offering several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of various conditions such as arthritis and skin issues. The therapeutic actions of Centaurea pseudoscabiosa subsp. araratica are attributed to its bioactive constituents, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils, which exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties.
